objective: Strategie de Breakout sur ATUSDC 1d. Indicateurs : EMA(20), OBV, ATR. Entree long apres cassure de EMA(20) suivie d'un pullback leger (retracement < 50% du breakout) avec OBV en hausse. Stop-loss = 1.0x ATR, take-profit = 2.0x ATR.

iterations.hypothesis: EMA(20) breakout signals trend; pullback confirms entry. OBV validates momentum. ATR manages risk.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] Possible weaknesses: false breakouts, look-ahead bias from ATR calculation, lagging EMA. Parameter sensitivity may reduce robustness.
[Backup plan] If poor: switch to RSI for momentum, use shorter EMA. If mediocre: optimize ATR multiplier, add volume filter. Alternative: breakout on consolidation pattern with Fibonacci retracement levels.
